an8.15:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these eight stains. What eight? (1) Non-recitation is the stain of the hymns. (2) The stain of houses is lack of upkeep.(3) The stain of beauty is laziness. (4) Heedlessness is the stain of a guard. (5) A woman's stain is misconduct. (6) Miserliness is a donor's stain. (7) Bad unwholesome qualities are stains in this world and the next. (8) A stain graver than this is ignorance, the very worst of stains. These, bhikkhus, are the eight stains."
an8.15:1.0.2: Non-recitation is the stain of the hymns;the stain of houses is lack of upkeep;the stain of beauty is laziness,heedlessness is the stain of a guard.
an8.15:1.0.3: A woman's stain is misconduct,miserliness is a donor's stain;bad unwholesome qualities are stainsin this world and the next.A stain graver than theseis ignorance, the worst of stains.
